corrections.text: The article attributes to Malwarebytes the statement that the earlier 'mother of all breaches' held 26 billion records. The cited Malwarebytes article uses the phrase 'mother of all breaches' but does not give a 26-billion figure (it identifies that earlier dump's source as Leak-Lookup without a record count). The 26-billion figure comes from the cited Cybernews source, which describes its own 2024 'supermassive leak' of over 26 billion records as the only comparable prior discovery. The comparison itself is accurate; only the source attribution was incorrect.
